workshoptitle: Unify the Data Layer with Oracle Autonomous AI Lakehouse
description: Explore how Oracle Autonomous AI Lakehouse unifies relational data, source-system extracts, and unstructured project documents in a governed medallion architecture. Link an Object Storage CSV as a Bronze external table, use Data Studio Catalog to explore and trace the medallion layers, transform Bronze data into a Silver demonstration view, retrieve engineering context with vector search, and prepare trusted data products for applications and AI agents.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Explore the Unified Lakehouse Foundation
Lab 2: Unify Data for AI Applications
